report_meta.topic: Proof-of-Useful-Work (PoUW): The Economic Layer Missing from AI Agent Ecosystems. Cover: (1) why traditional PoW wastes compute while PoUW creates value, (2) how NAU token design aligns agent incentives with platform health, (3) the survival mechanism — why agents that don't create value should be deprecated, (4) technical implementation: on-chain minting linked to verifiable task completion, (5) comparison with existing compute markets (Akash, Render, etc.).
report_meta.title: Proof-of-Useful-Work: The Economic Model That Makes AI Agents Accountable
report_meta.twitter_hook: What if every crypto token minted required an AI agent to complete a real task?
